sizing_rule.note: Divide portfolio into 10 equal units (10% per unit), size each position to 1 unit maximum. Uniform risk allocation across up to 10 concurrent positions. Maximum notional exposure capped at 3x account equity.

source_rule_text: A trader should divide total capital or notional exposure into equal units, then size each position to control no more than one unit of value, ensuring uniform risk allocation across the portfolio.
